events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess described field condition. But user gave scenario with no actual photos or specific defects. It says progress photos show current checkpoint scope finished for this area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference material on hand. Need evaluate field condition and return decision. Since no specific defects described, and stage rough-complete, likely pass? But we must be careful: as competent inspector, if no evidence of defects and scope finished, decision pass, low risk, percent complete high. However maybe there is insufficient info because no photos provided? The prompt says "Progress photos for Rebar placement show..." but we don't see them. We only have text description. It asks assess described field condition. Since described as finished, remaining cleanup outside scope. No defects flagged. So pass. Need include references ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings. component_conditions empty. percent_complete maybe 95. value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty. workable empty. findings empty. actions maybe none or schedule inspection. Need produce valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside JSON.
